Plan (total: 3.4ms, planning: 0.3ms, execution: 3.2ms)

[1] Limit  rows=42  time=3.2ms  loops=1
    buffers: shared hit=402 read=0
└─ [2] Sort  rows=42  time=3.1ms  loops=1
    sort_key=o.created_at DESC  method=top-N heapsort  memory=30kB
    buffers: shared hit=402 read=0
    └─ [3] Hash Join  rows=4,160  time=2.9ms  loops=1
        hash_cond=(o.customer_id = c.id)
        buffers: shared hit=399 read=0
        ├─ [4] Seq Scan on orders o  rows=12,500  time=1.9ms  loops=1  ℹ
        │   filter=(status = 'shipped'::text)  filter_removed=37,500
        │   buffers: shared hit=368 read=0
        └─ [5] Hash  rows=1,666  time=0.2ms  loops=1
            buffers: shared hit=31 read=0
            └─ [6] Bitmap Heap Scan on customers c  rows=1,666  time=0.1ms  loops=1
                buffers: shared hit=31 read=0
                └─ [7] Bitmap Index Scan  rows=1,666  time=0.0ms  loops=1
                    index=customers_region_idx  index_cond=(region = 'EU'::text)
                    buffers: shared hit=3 read=0

Summary
  Slowest node (exclusive):  [4] Seq Scan on orders o — 1.9ms (56% of total)
  Biggest row misestimate:   [2] Sort — planned 4,169, actual 42 (99.3× over)
